Major buying signal: 122-child waitlist; Prop R3 building new elementary; Hopewell expanding to full capacity by 2027 with new Daniel Boone Elementary building. Email format likely first.last @warrencor3.org or ajohnson@warrencor3.org - verify in Apollo.
